parameters-en.Speed: Controls the speed or rate of the vibrato. When set to note values, Speed follows the system tempo.
parameters-en.Depth: Controls the depth or intensity of the vibrato.
parameters-en.Rise: Controls how long it takes for the vibrato to "ramp up" to full depth. At 0%, vibrato happens immediately; at higher values it slowly appears over several seconds.
parameters-en.Vol Sens: Turning this parameter up provides more sensitive "peak follower" control over vibrato speed. Louder playing speeds up the vibrato and softer playing slows it down.
parameters-en.Mix: Controls the blend between the modulation effect and the dry signal. At 0%, no modulation is heard; at 100%, no dry signal is heard.
parameters-en.Level: Sets the overall level of the block.
